svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="CIzJH_iOAjH_xJxio88y" name="延迟消息"> <mxGraphModel dx="1226" dy="849" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15" value="" style="group" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="440" width="1055" height="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-2" value="<b>Broker 内部</b>" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;shadow=1;rounded=1;" vertex="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15"> <mxGeometry x="243.32" y="10" width="625.78" height="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-6" value="发送延迟消息
delayLevel = 3" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15"> <mxGeometry x="-30" y="58.51063829787234" width="96.50112233445567" height="82.97872340425532" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-7" value="Level 3 队列
(10s)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15"> <mxGeometry x="272.92648709315375" y="58.51063829787234" width="87.6206509539843" height="82.97872340425532" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-8" value="⏱ 定时扫描服务
ScheduleMessageService" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15"> <mxGeometry x="470.0026374859709" y="58.51063829787234" width="138.53535353535355" height="82.97872340425532" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-9" value="Topic: order-topic
MessageQueue 0" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15"> <mxGeometry x="739.9966217732886" y="58.51063829787234" width="111.8939393939394" height="82.97872340425532" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-10" value="正常消费消息" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15"> <mxGeometry x="970.0030976430978" y="71.27659574468086" width="92.35690235690237" height="57.4468085106383" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-11" value="每隔 1s 轮询
检查到期时间" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15" source="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-7" target="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-12" value="到期 → 还原 Topic
投递到真实队列" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15" source="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-8" target="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-13" value="Broker 拦截
替换 Topic 为
SCHEDULE_TOPIC_XXXX" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15" source="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-6" target="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-14" value="按正常流程
拉取消费" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15" source="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-9" target="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-16" value="隐藏队列" style="text;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15"> <mxGeometry x="281.74" y="20" width="70" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-17" value="真实目标队列" style="text;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="Lm7ukF6NRA5yw07YyNQh-15"> <mxGeometry x="745.94" y="20" width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
